sections.sectionTitle: Jeremiah Thong A Khiat Manin Pashhur Tungah Siatna Tung

verses.text: Jeremiah in a gen hih thute, Immer' tapa, Topa' biakinn ukpa ahi siampi Pashhur in a za hi
Tua ciangin Pashhur in kamsang Jeremiah sat a, Benjamin Kongpi saknung gei, Topa' biakinn sungah kol a bulh hi
A zing ciangin Pashhur in a kolbulhna panin Jeremiah a khah khit ciangin Jeremiah in, “ Topa in nang, Pashhur ci-in hong sam nawnlo a, ‘Mun Khempeuhah Launa,’ ci-in hong samta hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong cihin-ah, ‘En in, keimah in nang leh na lawmte' launa dingin nang kong bawl ding hi. Babylon kumpipa' khutsungah Judah gam khempeuh ka pia ding hi. Amah in sal dingin amaute Babylon khua-ah paipih ding a, namsau tawh a thatlum ding hi

Tua thamloin khuapi sunga hauhna khempeuh, a nasepsa uh khempeuh, a neih a lam a thupiteng khempeuh uh leh Judah kumpite' sumlepai khempeuhte a galte' khutsungah ka pia ding a, amaute in sutin, manin, Babylon khua-ah a paipih ding uh hi

Pashhur aw, nang leh na innsung uha omte khempeuh sal dingin Babylon khua-ah na pai ding uh a, tua lai munah nang na si ding hi. Nanga kipan a manlopi-a na thuhilh a ngai na lawmte khempeuh hong kivui ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Topa aw, kei nong khem a, khemna ka thuak takpi hi. Kei sangin nang na hatzaw a, keimah nong zo hi. Nisimin mite' nuihsat lel ka suak a, mi khempeuh in kei hong zahko uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh thu ka gen simin, “Ngongtatna leh kisiatna!” ci-in ka kiko den hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' kammal ka gen khiatna hangin nisimin simmawhna leh zahpihna ka thuaklawh hi

Keimah in, “Ama thu ka gen kei ding a, ama min ka lo kei ding hi,” ci mah leng zong, ama thu ka lungsim sungah mei bangin hong kuang a, ka guh ka tang sungah kikhumcip ahih manin ka ki-ipipna-in ka gimlua a, genloin ka om thei kei hi

Mite' kihuau simna thu tampi ka za a, mun khempeuh lauhuai hi. Ka lawm itte khempeuh in ka cihmawh ding hong ngak gige uh a, “A mawhna pulak ni! A mawhna pulak ni! Amah i khemzo khading hi. Tua hi leh i zo khading a, tua ciangin i thukkik ding hi,” hong ci uh hi

Ahih hangin Topa pen a kihtakhuai galhangpa bangin kei tawh hong omkhawm gige hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong bawlsiate tuk ding uh a, kei hong zolo ding uh hi. A tawntunga a mindaina uh kimangngilh ngeilo ding hi
A thuman mite a entel, lungsim leh ngaihsutna a mu Vanglian Topa aw, amaute na thukkikna kei hong musak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma khutsungah ka thu kong ap khin hi
Topa' tungah la sa un la, Topa phat un! Migilote' khutsung panin amah in mi cimawhte a honkhia hi
Keima suah ni in gimna thuak ta hen! Ka nu in kei a hong suahsak ni in thupha ngah kei ta hen
Ka pa kiangah, “Tapa khat na nei hi,” ci-in va ko-in a lungdamsakpa in gimna thuak ta hen
Topa in hehpih loin a lumlet khuapite tawh tuapa kibang ta hen. Zingsangin kahna aw za hen la, sun ciangin patauhna aw za ta hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ka nu' gilsungah kei hong thatlo hi. Hong that hi leh ka nu' gilsung ka han suakpah ding hi
Gimna leh dahna a mu ding leh nisima maizum den dingin bang hangin a gilsung panin suakkhia sese ka hi hiam?
